indicators.name: Stainless steel countertops
indicators.rationale: Stainless steel surfaces are easy to clean and resistant to heat and stains.

indicators.name: Large open shelves
indicators.rationale: Large open shelves provide ample storage space for cookware and dishes.

indicators.name: Proper lighting
indicators.rationale: Good lighting is essential for precise cooking tasks.

indicators.name: Close proximity to kitchen sink
indicators.rationale: Easy access to water and drainage is crucial for cooking.

reasoning_summary: The kitchen is well-equipped and organized, providing a suitable environment for daily cooking activities.
